title: Arc<form::Script> in CompiledScript enables cheap clone/share
description: lib.rs:35: CompiledScript wraps Arc<form::Script>. A reviewer might ask why Arc instead of owning Script directly. The Arc enables: (1) cloning CompiledScript without copying the parse tree, (2) sharing across threads with Send+Sync. The Send+Sync assertion at lib.rs:38-44 is correctly verified at compile time. Compile once, evaluate from many threads is the right design for an MTA. Defend this.
